Playstyles.Label: Bow / Crossbow
Playstyles.Description: Stay at range. Pierce damage and stealth bonuses.

Playstyles.Label: Knives
Playstyles.Description: Fast, sneaky melee. High burst, low defense.

Playstyles.Label: Clubs / Maces
Playstyles.Description: Stand and fight. Built to take hits and deal blunt damage.

Playstyles.Label: Fists
Playstyles.Description: Mobile unarmed fighter. No movement penalty, high aggression.

Playstyles.Label: Swords
Playstyles.Description: Balanced swordsman. Versatile, good for beginners.

Playstyles.Label: Polearms
Playstyles.Description: Aggressive reach fighter. Keep enemies at distance.

Playstyles.Label: Spears
Playstyles.Description: Defensive spear fighter. Throw or thrust, shield compatible.

Playstyles.Label: Light Armor
Playstyles.Description: Speed and stamina over protection. Pairs well with bows, knives, and fists.

Playstyles.Label: Heavy Armor
Playstyles.Description: Maximum protection. Movement penalty in exchange for survivability.
